original_image_tags: A hand-drawn pencil diagram on aged, tan-colored paper. The sketch depicts a quadrilateral or trapezoidal shape with vertices labeled "#1", "#2", "#3", and "#4". Lines connect the vertices, forming the sides and diagonals of the shape. Measurements and angles are annotated along the lines. Labels and text are handwritten around the diagram.

elements.description: A hand-drawn diagram on aged, tan paper depicting a layout of four points (labeled #1, #2, #3, #4) connected by lines, with two intersecting diagonal lines. Three of the points are labeled 'Dirt Berm' and one area is labeled 'General Area of Footprints' with a rough outline of footprints drawn inside. Various measurements in feet and inches (e.g., 9' 7 1/2", 14' 5 1/2", 11' 10 1/2") and approximate angles (e.g., ~90°, ~45°) are annotated along the lines. The fourth point at the bottom right is labeled 'Berm'. The diagram appears to be a site or impact layout sketch.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim labels like 'Dirt Berm', 'General Area of Footprints', and 'Berm' that are not present in Description A, indicating contradictory claims about text within the image.
